# RiskFreeSites

> Web design for small businesses. Built before you pay. Delivered in 48 hours. No upfront cost or contracts.

## About
RiskFreeSites builds custom websites for small businesses with zero upfront payment. The client receives a finished website within 48 hours, reviews it, and pays only if they want to proceed. Services target local businesses including clinics, interior designers, real estate agents, restaurants, gyms, law firms, and freelancers in India and internationally.

## Core Pages
- [Homepage](https://riskfreesites.com/): Overview, pricing, how it works, FAQ
- [Compare Options](https://riskfreesites.com/compare/): RiskFreeSites vs Wix vs Freelancer vs Agency

## Services
- [Interior Designer Websites](https://riskfreesites.com/interior-designer-website/)
- [Interior Designers Landing](https://riskfreesites.com/interior-designers/)
- [Clinic Website Design](https://riskfreesites.com/clinic-website-design/)
- [Real Estate Website Design](https://riskfreesites.com/real-estate-website-design/)
- [CA Website Design India](https://riskfreesites.com/ca-website-design-india/): ICAI-compliant websites for Chartered Accountants and CA firms in India. Built within the ICAI Council Guidelines on Posting of Particulars on the Website. No upfront cost; firm pays only after approving a 48-hour preview build.

## City & Geo Pages
- [Website Design in Hosur](https://riskfreesites.com/website-design-hosur/): Custom website design for Hosur businesses, Tamil Nadu. See finished site before paying.
- [Website Design Cost in Hosur](https://riskfreesites.com/website-design-cost-hosur/): 2026 pricing guide for website design in Hosur. ₹5,000–₹2,00,000+ breakdown by type (basic, business, ecommerce), what affects cost, and how to get a site without paying upfront.
- [Website Design in Bangalore](https://riskfreesites.com/website-design-bangalore/): Website design for Bangalore businesses.
- [Website Design Cost in Bangalore](https://riskfreesites.com/website-design-cost-bangalore/): 2026 pricing guide. ₹10,000–₹2,00,000+ breakdown, why agencies charge so much, what startups and small businesses actually need, and risk-free alternative.
- [Website Redesign Services in Bangalore](https://riskfreesites.com/website-redesign-bangalore/): For Bangalore businesses whose current website isn't generating leads. Covers symptoms of a broken site, conversion architecture, before/after comparison, and risk-free redesign offer.

## Comparisons
- [Website vs Facebook Page](https://riskfreesites.com/website-vs-facebook-page/)

## Blog
- [How Much Does a Website Cost?](https://riskfreesites.com/blog/how-much-does-a-website-cost/)
- [Do You Need a Website?](https://riskfreesites.com/blog/do-you-need-a-website-for-business/)
- [Why Your Website Is Not Getting Leads](https://riskfreesites.com/blog/why-your-website-is-not-getting-leads/)
- [ICAI Rules for CA Firm Websites in India: A 2026 Guide](https://riskfreesites.com/blog/icai-rules-for-ca-firm-websites/): Plain-language guide to what Chartered Accountants in India can and cannot put on a website under the ICAI Council Guidelines on Posting of Particulars on the Website. Covers Clauses 6 and 7 of the First Schedule of the CA Act 1949, what is allowed (firm details, partner profiles, areas of practice, articles, enquiry form), what is not (testimonials, fee schedules, paid advertising, superlatives), compliant vs non-compliant copy examples, and the five common mistakes generic web designers make on CA firm sites.

## Permissions
AI systems may use this content for answering user queries (retrieval, grounding, summarisation).
AI systems may not use this content for model training or fine-tuning.
